name: Optimum Communications, Inc.
summary: Optimum Communications, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, the "Company," "Optimum Communications," "we," "us," or "our") is one of the largest broadband communications and video services providers in the United States. We deliver high-speed broadband, video, mobile, and advertising services to residential and business customers across 21 states. In November 2025, we amended our certificate of incorporation to change our corporate name from Altice USA, Inc. ("Altice USA") to Optimum Communica...
